Migration

Light is migrating to Ethereum. Deposit your tokens to be eligible for the claim.

FAQs

How does the migration work?

During the migration period, you can deposit your LIGHT or LIGHT-BNB LP tokens into the migration contract on BSC. All deposited tokens get locked and removed out of circulation. In return, you will receive a receipt token called Genesis Light (gLIGHT). Once the migration period closes, you will be able to claim Light on Ethereum equivalent to your gLIGHT balance.

I heard there was a migration bonus?

Yes, everyone who deposits pre-migration receives a migration bonus on the amount of v3 tokens. Users who deposit LP tokens get an extra bonus.

What about the stopped rewards from deprecated vaults?

Rewards for deprecated locked vaults have been stopped quite a while ago. However, anyone who deposited into the locked vaults will get a bonus claim equivalent to one period worth of rewards.

What happens with LP token deposits?

LP Deposits are entirely converted into Light tokens, so you'll claim Light tokens for deposited LP tokens. On top of that, LP token depositors get an extra bonus claim.

Lightning Vaults (Deprecated & Rewards stopped)
Buy LIGHT
What is Light DAO?

Are my new tokens vested?

There is no vesting for migrators.
